commit_scope: Add trace-grounded symbol spaces and a file-backed active recipe trace index.

commands: cd api && /Users/ursmuff/source/Coherence-Network/api/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_active_recipe_trace_index.py tests/test_active_recipe_tracing_form.py tests/test_trace_symbol_spaces_form.py

cd api && /opt/homebrew/bin/ruff check tests/test_active_recipe_trace_index.py tests/test_active_recipe_tracing_form.py tests/test_trace_symbol_spaces_form.py ../scripts/active_recipe_trace_index.py ../scripts/wellness_check.py
local_validation.summary: Trace symbol spaces now live in docs/coherence-substrate/trace-symbol-spaces.form, with docs/coherence-substrate/trace-symbol-spaces-proof.fk as the native kernel proof. The artifact names the raw trace paths, Tau/Upsilon/Chi/efficacy-probe cells, shared Blueprint 1.5.142425.0, five active strategy recipes, weak-signal efficacy signatures, four selected symbol spaces, four observed tightnesses, and closure recipes for each gap. The Form proof is walked by a compiled form-cli binary from experiments/form-kernel-go, reads _field_traces.jsonl through Form-native read_file, and returns true for the current-breath active recipe pattern. The file-backed bridge scripts/active_recipe_trace_index.py now answers ?active_recipe_traces @cell since current_breath from _field_traces.jsonl, so active recipes hydrate from the witness stream instead of manual list input. Wellness now resolves Form declarations, so the new Form spec no longer appears as symbol drift. Native kernel proof, focused pytest, ruff, wellness, spec quality, evidence validation, generated-index check, diff check, local PR guard, and PR follow-through checks passed.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation is complete; CI and deployment validation remain pending.
